---
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.15/index.global.min.css" rel="stylesheet"/>
          <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.15/index.global.min.js"></script>
---

# 📅 Personal Calendar

Welcome to your personal calendar. This calendar aggregates events from multiple sources into a single interactive view.



::: {.calendar-wrap}
<div id="calendar" style="height: 600px;"></div>
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Initialize events from sync_calendar.py
const events = [];

// Initialize FullCalendar
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(){
  const calEl = document.getElementById("calendar");
  if (typeof FullCalendar === "undefined") {
    calEl.innerHTML = "<p style='color: red;'>Calendar library not loaded</p>";
    return;
  }
  
  const calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calEl, {
    initialView: "dayGridMonth",
    initialDate: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
    height: "auto",
    headerToolbar: {
      left: "prev,next today",
      center: "title",
      right: "dayGridMonth,timeGridWeek,listMonth"
    },
    events: events,
    eventDisplay: "block",
    nowIndicator: true
  });
  
  calendar.render();
});
</script>
```

<div class="calendar-layout">
<div class="calendar-sidebar calendar-sidebar-left" role="complementary" aria-labelledby="agenda-title">
<section class="calendar-panel agenda-panel">
<h2 id="agenda-title">Day's Agenda</h2>
<p class="calendar-panel-note">Track what's open now and what's coming up next.</p>
<div id="agenda-active" class="agenda-sections"></div>
</section>
</div>

<div class="calendar-main">
<div id="calendar"></div>
<section id="projects-section" aria-labelledby="projects-title">
<h2 id="projects-title">Current Active Projects</h2>
<p class="projects-note">
Synced from <a href="https://mcphersonlab.github.io/research/projects" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">mcphersonlab.github.io/research/projects</a>.
</p>
<div class="projects-table-wrapper">
<table id="projects-table" class="projects-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Project (Link)</th>
<th>Question</th>
<th>Target Conference</th>
<th>
<button type="button" class="table-sort" data-sort-key="call" onclick="setProjectsSort('call')">
Call for Paper <span class="sort-indicator" aria-hidden="true">↕</span>
</button>
</th>
<th>Big Name Journal</th>
<th>
<button type="button" class="table-sort" data-sort-key="completion" onclick="setProjectsSort('completion')">
% Completion <span class="sort-indicator" aria-hidden="true">↕</span>
</button>
</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody id="projects-tbody">
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</section>

<!-- ── Calls for Papers without linked projects ─────────────── -->
<section id="unlinked-cfps-section" aria-labelledby="unlinked-cfps-title">
<h2 id="unlinked-cfps-title">Calls for Papers</h2>
<p class="projects-note">
Calls for papers from <a href="https://mcphersonlab.github.io/research" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">mcphersonlab.github.io/research</a> that do not yet have a linked active project.
</p>
<div class="projects-table-wrapper">
<table id="unlinked-cfps-table" class="projects-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Call for Papers</th>
<th>Journal</th>
<th>
<button type="button" class="table-sort" data-sort-key="impact" onclick="setUnlinkedCfpsSort('impact')">
IF <span class="sort-indicator" aria-hidden="true">↕</span>
</button>
</th>
<th>
<button type="button" class="table-sort" data-sort-key="date" onclick="setUnlinkedCfpsSort('date')">
Deadline <span class="sort-indicator" aria-hidden="true">↕</span>
</button>
</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody id="unlinked-cfps-tbody">
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</section>
</div>

<div class="calendar-sidebar calendar-sidebar-right calendar-sidebar-stack" role="complementary" aria-labelledby="calendar-filters-title">
<section class="calendar-panel">
<h2 id="calendar-filters-title">Events Calendar</h2>
<p class="calendar-panel-note">Show:</p>
<div class="filter-bar" id="filter-bar">
<label class="filter-nih">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-nih" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:#BF5700;"></span> NIH Grant Deadlines
</label>
<label class="filter-conference">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-conference" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:#0d6efd;"></span> Conferences
</label>
<label class="filter-abstract">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-abstract" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:rgba(13,202,240,0.1);"></span> Abstracts
</label>
<label class="filter-cfp">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-cfp" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:#dc3545;"></span> Calls for Papers
</label>
<label class="filter-lablife">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-lablife" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:rgba(25,135,84,0.1);"></span> Lab Life
</label>
<label class="filter-venue">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-venue" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:rgba(111,66,193,0.1);"></span> Venues
</label>
<label class="filter-trainee">
<input type="checkbox" id="chk-trainee" checked onchange="applyFilters()">
<span class="legend-dot" style="background:rgba(102,16,242,0.12);"></span> Trainee Deadlines
</label>
</div>
</section>
<section class="calendar-panel" aria-labelledby="agenda-done-title">
<h3 id="agenda-done-title">Done</h3>
<div id="agenda-done" class="agenda-sections"></div>
</section>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ── Event detail modal ───────────────────────────────────── -->
<div id="event-modal-overlay">
<div id="event-modal">
<button id="event-modal-close" onclick="closeModal()" aria-label="Close">×</button>
<div id="event-modal-colorbar"></div>
<h4 id="modal-title"></h4>
<table id="modal-table"></table>
</div>
</div>

:::

```{=html}
<script>
// ================================================================
//  EVENT DATA
// ================================================================

// ── 1. Academic Conferences (from mcphersonlab.github.io/research) ──
const conferences = [
  { title:"Staphylococcal Diseases Gordon Research Conference", start:"2027-08-08", end:"2027-08-14", location:"Waterville Valley, NH, USA", url:"https://www.grc.org/staphylococcal-diseases-conference/2027/", cfpNote:"2027 abstract dates TBD; check GRC website" },
  { title:"ClostPath Biennial", start:"2027-09-01", end:"2027-09-05", location:"Paris, France (2027 TBD)", url:"https://www.clostpath2025.conferences-pasteur.org/", cfpNote:"2027 dates and location TBD (biennial); map shows 2025 host city" },
  { title:"Peggy Lillis Foundation National C. diff Summit", start:"2026-04-13", end:"2026-04-14", location:"Washington, DC", url:"https://cdiff.org/event/summit26/" },
  { title:"BPS Annual", start:"2026-12-08", end:"2026-12-11", location:"Manchester, UK", url:"https://www.bps.ac.uk/events", cfpOpen:"2026-04-01", cfpClose:"2026-09-01", cfpNote:"See BPS website for abstract dates and details" },
  { title:"TMC AMR", start:"2027-01-13", end:"2027-01-16", location:"Houston, TX", url:"https://www.tmc.edu/events/", cfpNote:"10th Annual; 2027 dates TBD (typically mid-January)" },
  { title:"IMARI Annual", start:"2027-01-27", end:"2027-01-30", location:"Las Vegas, NV", url:"https://imari.org", cfpNote:"2027 dates TBD; check IMARI website" },
  { title:"BSAC and GARDP Antimicrobial Chemotherapy Conference", start:"2027-02-03", end:"2027-02-05", location:"Online", url:"https://acc-conference.com/", cfpNote:"2027 dates TBD; free online conference" },
  { title:"AAAS Annual", start:"2027-02-18", end:"2027-02-21", location:"Chicago, IL", url:"https://meetings.aaas.org/", cfpNote:"Abstract dates TBD; check AAAS website" },
  { title:"CSIRO AMR Summit", start:"2027-02-17", end:"2027-02-20", location:"Sydney, Australia", url:"https://www.csiro.au/en/about/challenges-missions/antimicrobial-resistance/amr-summit", cfpNote:"2027 dates TBD; invitation-only event" },
  { title:"Biophysical Society Annual", start:"2027-02-20", end:"2027-02-25", location:"Philadelphia, PA", url:"https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings", cfpNote:"Abstract dates TBD; see Biophysical Society website for updates" },
  { title:"CROI Annual", start:"2027-03-21", end:"2027-03-25", location:"San Diego, CA", url:"https://www.croiconference.org/", cfpNote:"Abstract dates TBD; check CROI website" },
  { title:"ASBMB Annual", start:"2026-03-07", end:"2026-03-11", location:"Washington, DC", url:"https://www.asbmb.org/annual-meeting" },
  { title:"EMBL AI and Biology", start:"2026-03-10", end:"2026-03-14", location:"EMBL Heidelberg and Online", url:"https://www.embl.org/about/info/course-and-conference-office/events/ees26-02/" },
  { title:"ESCMID Annual", start:"2026-04-17", end:"2026-04-22", location:"Munich, Germany", url:"https://www.escmid.org/congress-events/escmid-global/", cfpOpen:"2025-10-15", cfpClose:"2025-11-26" },
  { title:"TSHP/GCSHP Annual Seminar", start:"2026-04-24", end:"2026-04-27", location:"Galveston, TX", url:"https://tshp.org/mpage/as26" },
  { title:"Houston C diff & Microbiome Conference", start:"2026-04-30", end:"2026-05-01", location:"Houston, TX", url:"https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/", cfpOpen:"2026-02-14", cfpClose:"2026-03-31" },
  { title:"MAD-ID (SIDP)", start:"2026-05-14", end:"2026-05-18", location:"Orlando, Florida", url:"https://www.mad-id.org/annual-meeting-1", cfpNote:"See conference website for abstract dates and details" },
  { title:"ASPET Annual", start:"2026-05-17", end:"2026-05-21", location:"Minneapolis, MN", url:"https://www.aspet.org/aspet/meetings-awards", cfpOpen:"2025-09-22", cfpClose:"2025-12-04" },
  { title:"ISPOR Annual", start:"2026-05-17", end:"2026-05-21", location:"Philadelphia, PA", url:"https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education", cfpOpen:"2025-10-31", cfpClose:"2026-01-09" },
  { title:"ASM Microbe", start:"2026-06-11", end:"2026-06-16", location:"Washington, DC", url:"https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe", cfpOpen:"2025-10-15", cfpClose:"2026-01-21", cfpNote:"Travel awards: Oct 15 - Dec 2, 2025; Abstracts: Dec 2, 2025 - Jan 21, 2026" },
  { title:"Anaerobe Biennial", start:"2026-07-07", end:"2026-07-11", location:"New York, NY, USA", url:"http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/", cfpOpen:"2025-10-23", cfpClose:"2026-02-01", cfpNote:"Oral: Jan 1, 2026; Poster: Feb 1, 2026" },
  { title:"IUPHAR Annual", start:"2026-07-12", end:"2026-07-18", location:"Melbourne, Australia", url:"https://www.iuphar.org/", cfpOpen:"2025-02-01", cfpClose:"2025-09-15" },
  { title:"AACP Pharmacy Education", start:"2026-07-18", end:"2026-07-22", location:"Grapevine, TX", url:"https://www.aacp.org/events/annual-meetings" },
  { title:"Conference on Beneficial Microbes", start:"2026-07-19", end:"2026-07-24", location:"Madison, WI", url:"https://conferences.union.wisc.edu/microbes/", cfpOpen:"2026-02-01", cfpClose:"2026-04-08" },
  { title:"ASV Annual", start:"2026-07-27", end:"2026-07-31", location:"Minneapolis, MN", url:"https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting", cfpOpen:"2025-12-01", cfpClose:"2026-02-01" },
  { title:"STI Prevention Conference", start:"2026-09-01", end:"2026-09-02", location:"TBD", url:"https://stipreventionconference.org/", cfpNote:"2026 dates and location to be announced" },
  { title:"The 9th International C. difficile Symposium (ICDS)", start:"2026-09-08", end:"2026-09-11", location:"Bled, Slovenia", url:"https://www.icds.si/", cfpOpen:"2026-03-10", cfpClose:"2026-05-15" },
  { title:"MSGERC Biennial", start:"2026-09-09", end:"2026-09-12", location:"Denver, CO", url:"https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/", cfpOpen:"2026-04-01", cfpClose:"2026-07-31" },
  { title:"Rice AI in Health", start:"2026-09-14", end:"2026-09-18", location:"Houston, TX", url:"https://www.aihealthconference.com/" },
  { title:"ESCV Annual", start:"2026-09-16", end:"2026-09-20", location:"Porto, Portugal", url:"https://escv.eu/calendar-events/", cfpOpen:"2026-02-02", cfpClose:"2026-05-11" },
  { title:"Global AMR Innovators' Conference (GAMRIC)", start:"2026-09-22", end:"2026-09-25", location:"Lisbon, Portugal", url:"https://www.gamric.org/", cfpOpen:"2026-03-10", cfpClose:"2026-03-31" },
  { title:"North American Cystic Fibrosis (CF) Conference", start:"2026-10-07", end:"2026-10-11", location:"Atlanta, Georgia", url:"https://www.nacfconference.org/", cfpOpen:"2026-03-17", cfpClose:"2026-04-17" },
  { title:"IDSA IDWeek", start:"2026-10-21", end:"2026-10-25", location:"Washington, DC", url:"https://www.idweek.org/", cfpOpen:"2026-02-18", cfpClose:"2026-04-30" },
  { title:"ASHP Midyear", start:"2026-12-06", end:"2026-12-10", location:"Orlando, FL", url:"https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition", cfpOpen:"2026-05-30", cfpClose:"2026-10-01" }
];

// ── 2. Calls for Papers (deadline as single-day event) ──────────
const callsForPapers = [
  { title:"CFP: Computational Modelling and Network Medicine in Drug Toxicology and Clinical Pharmacovigilance", journal:"Journal of Translational Medicine (IF 7.5)", impact:"7.5", date:"2026-01-21", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/eabdigafhj" },
  { title:"CFP: Drug discovery of ion channels", journal:"npj Drug Discovery", impact:"", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjdrugdiscov/collections" },
  { title:"CFP: Drug discovery at G Protein-Coupled Receptors", journal:"npj Drug Discovery", impact:"", date:"2026-09-30", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gfaahhfcaj" },
  { title:"CFP: Data to support drug discovery", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-04-22", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/efidabcffj" },
  { title:"CFP: Credentials in Artificial Intelligence: International Perspectives on Transforming Teaching and Learning in Higher Education", journal:"International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education (IF 16.7)", impact:"16.7", date:"2026-03-01", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/cgfhfcafai" },
  { title:"CFP: Human Interaction with Gen AI Across Learning and Teaching Processes in Higher Education", journal:"International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education (IF 16.7)", impact:"16.7", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/iddjabccja" },
  { title:"CFP: Innovation, AI, and education", journal:"Humanities and Social Sciences Communications (IF 3.9)", impact:"3.9", date:"2026-07-09", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gffbgaahgb" },
  { title:"CFP: Datasets in Education", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-08-19", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gcgjjfihgg" },
  { title:"CFP: Transforming Medical Education through Artificial Intelligence", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-04-24", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ehadbhgiji" },
  { title:"CFP: Antimicrobials and Resistance in the Food Chain", journal:"npj Antimicrobials and Resistance (IF 8.7)", impact:"8.7", date:"2026-07-08", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/bbeihchhgf" },
  { title:"CFP: AI for Population Medicine and Public Health", journal:"npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-05-15", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef" },
  { title:"CFP: The microbiome in precision medicine", journal:"npj Genomic Medicine (IF 4.8)", impact:"4.8", date:"2026-03-28", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/iaadjjbbea" },
  { title:"CFP: Diabetes and infectious disease", journal:"BMC Medicine (IF 9.4)", impact:"9.4", date:"2026-03-29", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/feijedifdj" },
  { title:"CFP: Viral hepatitis", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2025-12-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/abidffbfch" },
  { title:"CFP: Infection and cancer", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-03-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihdbhcefif" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial intelligence and machine learning applications in microbiology", journal:"BMC Microbiology (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-01-09", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/bbiccggggj" },
  { title:"CFP: Economics of AI in Healthcare", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-01-10", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/cbebcjddei" },
  { title:"CFP: Health policy and systems research", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-01-14", url:"https://www.nature.com/ncomms/calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Pathogen Drug Permeability", journal:"npj Antimicrobials and Resistance (IF 8.7)", impact:"8.7", date:"2026-04-15", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjamar/calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Natural bioactives, Gut microbiome, and human metabolism", journal:"npj Biofilms and Microbiomes (IF 9.3)", impact:"9.3", date:"2026-05-20", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihecbjhhdd" },
  { title:"CFP: Advances in microbial ecology", journal:"BMC Microbiology (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-05-20", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/ddbhjfadca" },
  { title:"CFP: Therapies for cystic fibrosis", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/jhbbbdafac" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial Intelligence Methodology in Structural Biology", journal:"Nature Communications/Nature Structural & Molecular Biology (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/jbdjhghacg" },
  { title:"CFP: Computational methodology for drug discovery", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-02-28", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/dhcgiaigac" },
  { title:"CFP: Climate change and infectious diseases", journal:"Nature Microbiology/Nature Health (IF 19.4)", impact:"19.4", date:"2026-06-01", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja" },
  { title:"CFP: Climate change and human health", journal:"BMC Medicine (IF 10.0)", impact:"10.0", date:"2026-03-02", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/idgcedfhia" },
  { title:"CFP: The clinical microbiome", journal:"Nature Microbiology/Nature Medicine (IF 19.4 / 87.3)", impact:"19.4 / 87.3", date:"2026-03-11", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/cajbgagjib" },
  { title:"CFP: Impact of agentic AI on care delivery", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-07-12", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ghaghgcbei" },
  { title:"CFP: Cracking the code of AMR: resistance genomics", journal:"npj Antimicrobials and Resistance (IF 8.7)", impact:"8.7", date:"2026-06-24", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg" },
  { title:"CFP: Exploring the New Frontier in Tropical Medicine with Computational Intelligence, AI, and IoT Integration for Healthcare", journal:"Tropical Medicine and Health (IF 3.5)", impact:"3.5", date:"2026-03-25", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/hfjhadfjeh" },
  { title:"CFP: Data on Science and Innovation Processes, Outputs and Outcomes", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-03-26", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ijdfjejjeh" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial intelligence for next-generation anti-infective discovery", journal:"ACS Infectious Diseases (IF 3.8)", impact:"3.8", date:"2026-04-01", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-artificial-intelligence-for-next-generation-anti-infective-discovery" },
  { title:"CFP: Data Science, AI and Machine Learning Approaches to AMR", journal:"npj Antimicrobials and Resistance (IF 8.7)", impact:"8.7", date:"2026-04-07", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/eecajaidbe" },
  { title:"CFP: Call For Papers: 100 Years of Quantum Mechanics—All About Molecules", journal:"Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation (JCTC) (IF 6.4)", impact:"6.4", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/theoretical-and-computational-chemistry/call-for-papers-100-years-of-quantum-mechanics-all-about-molecules" },
  { title:"CFP: Pharmaceutical Innovation and Global Health: Breakthroughs and Future", journal:"Journal of Medicinal Chemistry (IF 6.8)", impact:"6.8", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-pharmaceutical-innovation-and-global-health-breakthroughs-and-future" },
  { title:"CFP: Medicinal Chemistry and Pharmacology of Antiviral Drugs", journal:"ACS Infectious Diseases/ACS Medicinal Chemistry Letters/ACS Pharmacology & Translational Science/Journal of Medicinal Chemistry (IF 3.8 / 4.0 / 3.7 / 6.8)", impact:"3.8 / 4.0 / 3.7 / 6.8", date:"2026-09-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-medicinal-chemistry-and-pharmacology-of-antiviral-drugs" },
  { title:"CFP: Virtual Cell Models and AI in Drug Discovery", journal:"British Journal of Pharmacology (IF 7.7)", impact:"7.7", date:"2026-05-01", url:"https://bpspubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/hub/call-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Global Cancer Care: Obstacles, Solutions, and Impact on Survivorship", journal:"Nature Cancer/Communications Medicine/Communications Biology/Scientific Reports", impact:"", date:"2026-05-19", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/haifcgbgah" },
  { title:"CFP: Biology of drug resistance and tolerance in bacteria, viruses, fungi", journal:"Genome Biology (IF 9.4)", impact:"9.4", date:"2026-05-29", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/bjhecaieha" },
  { title:"CFP: Biofilms", journal:"Journal of Bacteriology (IF 3.2)", impact:"3.2", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://journals.asm.org/asm-calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Mechanistic insights into human host and microbiome interactions", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic" },
  { title:"CFP: Modeling the Impact of Protein Mutations on Chemical Reactions for Biochemistry, Protein Engineering, and Drug Discovery", journal:"Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation (JCTC) (IF 6.4)", impact:"6.4", date:"2026-06-01", url:"https://axial.acs.org/theoretical-and-computational-chemistry/call-for-papers-modeling-the-impact-of-protein-mutations-on-chemical-reactions-for-biochemistry-protein-engineering-and-drug-discovery" },
  { title:"CFP: Evaluating the real-world clinical performance of AI", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-06-03", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/hcdeibadid" },
  { title:"CFP: Viruses and cancers", journal:"npj Viruses", impact:"", date:"2026-06-12", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/bfaffbjija" },
  { title:"CFP: Microbiome and Reproductive Health", journal:"Microbiome (IF 12.7)", impact:"12.7", date:"2026-06-16", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/fbfahacdhi" },
  { title:"CFP: Impact of AI on medical research", journal:"BMC Medical Research Methodology (IF 5.2)", impact:"5.2", date:"2026-06-18", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/cdieieiacj" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial Intelligence in Genomic Medicine", journal:"npj Genomic Medicine (IF 4.8)", impact:"4.8", date:"2026-06-23", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjgenmed/calls-for-papers" },

// ── 3. NIH Grant Deadlines (from mcphersonlab.github.io/research) ──

  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2026-12-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" },
  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2027-04-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" },
  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2027-08-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" },
  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2027-12-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" },

  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2028-08-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" },
  { title:"🏛️ NIH R13/U13 Conference Grants", date:"2028-12-12", detail:"Conference grants", note:"Standard NIH due date", url:"https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates" }
];

// ── 4. Trainee Deadlines ───────────────────────────────────────
const traineeDeadlinePrograms = [
  { title:"MDACC CATALYST Program(s)", opensOn:"11-17", closesOn:"01-14" },
  { title:"McGovern - GradSURP", opensOn:"12-01", closesOn:"01-15" },
  { title:"McGovern - MicroSURP", opensOn:"12-01", closesOn:"02-01" },
  { title:"BCM SMART", opensOn:"10-01", closesOn:"01-30" },
  { title:"UH-CURE/UH-HEART", opensOn:"12-01", closesOn:"02-23" }
];

function monthDayToParts(monthDay) {
  const [month, day] = monthDay.split("-").map(Number);
  return { month, day };
}

function generateTraineeDeadlineEvents(startYear, endYear) {
  const events = [];
  for (let year = startYear; year <= endYear; year++) {
    traineeDeadlinePrograms.forEach(program => {
      const opensOn = monthDayToParts(program.opensOn);
      const closesOn = monthDayToParts(program.closesOn);
      const crossesYearBoundary = (
        closesOn.month < opensOn.month ||
        (closesOn.month === opensOn.month && closesOn.day < opensOn.day)
      );
      const opens = `${year}-${program.opensOn}`;
      const closes = `${crossesYearBoundary ? year + 1 : year}-${program.closesOn}`;
      events.push({
        title: `🎓 ${program.title} Opens`,
        start: opens,
        allDay: true,
        phase: "Open",
        detail: "Annual trainee program application opens",
        category: "trainee"
      });
      events.push({
        title: `🎓 ${program.title} Closes`,
        start: closes,
        allDay: true,
        phase: "Close",
        detail: "Annual trainee program application closes",
        category: "trainee"
      });
    });
  }
  return events;
}
const traineeDeadlineEvents = generateTraineeDeadlineEvents(2025, 2030);

// ── 5. Calls for Papers without linked projects ────────────────
const unlinkedCallsForPapers = [
  { title:"CFP: Computational Modelling and Network Medicine in Drug Toxicology and Clinical Pharmacovigilance", journal:"Journal of Translational Medicine (IF 7.5)", impact:"7.5", date:"2026-01-21", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/eabdigafhj" },
  { title:"CFP: Drug discovery of ion channels", journal:"npj Drug Discovery", impact:"", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjdrugdiscov/collections" },
  { title:"CFP: Drug discovery at G Protein-Coupled Receptors", journal:"npj Drug Discovery", impact:"", date:"2026-09-30", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gfaahhfcaj" },
  { title:"CFP: Data to support drug discovery", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-04-22", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/efidabcffj" },
  { title:"CFP: Credentials in Artificial Intelligence: International Perspectives on Transforming Teaching and Learning in Higher Education", journal:"International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education (IF 16.7)", impact:"16.7", date:"2026-03-01", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/cgfhfcafai" },
  { title:"CFP: Human Interaction with Gen AI Across Learning and Teaching Processes in Higher Education", journal:"International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education (IF 16.7)", impact:"16.7", date:"2026-05-31", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/iddjabccja" },
  { title:"CFP: Innovation, AI, and education", journal:"Humanities and Social Sciences Communications (IF 3.9)", impact:"3.9", date:"2026-07-09", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gffbgaahgb" },
  { title:"CFP: Datasets in Education", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-08-19", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gcgjjfihgg" },
  { title:"CFP: Transforming Medical Education through Artificial Intelligence", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-04-24", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ehadbhgiji" },
  { title:"CFP: Diabetes and infectious disease", journal:"BMC Medicine (IF 9.4)", impact:"9.4", date:"2026-03-29", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/feijedifdj" },
  { title:"CFP: Viral hepatitis", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2025-12-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/abidffbfch" },
  { title:"CFP: Infection and cancer", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-03-31", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihdbhcefif" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial intelligence and machine learning applications in microbiology", journal:"BMC Microbiology (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-01-09", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/bbiccggggj" },
  { title:"CFP: Economics of AI in Healthcare", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-01-10", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/cbebcjddei" },
  { title:"CFP: Health policy and systems research", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-01-14", url:"https://www.nature.com/ncomms/calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Pathogen Drug Permeability", journal:"npj Antimicrobials and Resistance (IF 8.7)", impact:"8.7", date:"2026-04-15", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjamar/calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Computational methodology for drug discovery", journal:"Nature Communications (IF 15.7)", impact:"15.7", date:"2026-02-28", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/dhcgiaigac" },
  { title:"CFP: Climate change and human health", journal:"BMC Medicine (IF 10.0)", impact:"10.0", date:"2026-03-02", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/idgcedfhia" },
  { title:"CFP: The clinical microbiome", journal:"Nature Microbiology/Nature Medicine (IF 19.4 / 87.3)", impact:"19.4 / 87.3", date:"2026-03-11", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/cajbgagjib" },
  { title:"CFP: Impact of agentic AI on care delivery", journal:"npj Digital Medicine (IF 15.1)", impact:"15.1", date:"2026-07-12", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ghaghgcbei" },
  { title:"CFP: Exploring the New Frontier in Tropical Medicine with Computational Intelligence, AI, and IoT Integration for Healthcare", journal:"Tropical Medicine and Health (IF 3.5)", impact:"3.5", date:"2026-03-25", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/hfjhadfjeh" },
  { title:"CFP: Data on Science and Innovation Processes, Outputs and Outcomes", journal:"Scientific Data (IF 4.0)", impact:"4.0", date:"2026-03-26", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/ijdfjejjeh" },
  { title:"CFP: Call For Papers: 100 Years of Quantum Mechanics—All About Molecules", journal:"Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation (JCTC) (IF 6.4)", impact:"6.4", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/theoretical-and-computational-chemistry/call-for-papers-100-years-of-quantum-mechanics-all-about-molecules" },
  { title:"CFP: Pharmaceutical Innovation and Global Health: Breakthroughs and Future", journal:"Journal of Medicinal Chemistry (IF 6.8)", impact:"6.8", date:"2026-04-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-pharmaceutical-innovation-and-global-health-breakthroughs-and-future" },
  { title:"CFP: Medicinal Chemistry and Pharmacology of Antiviral Drugs", journal:"ACS Infectious Diseases/ACS Medicinal Chemistry Letters/ACS Pharmacology & Translational Science/Journal of Medicinal Chemistry (IF 3.8 / 4.0 / 3.7 / 6.8)", impact:"3.8 / 4.0 / 3.7 / 6.8", date:"2026-09-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-medicinal-chemistry-and-pharmacology-of-antiviral-drugs" },
  { title:"CFP: Global Cancer Care: Obstacles, Solutions, and Impact on Survivorship", journal:"Nature Cancer/Communications Medicine/Communications Biology/Scientific Reports", impact:"", date:"2026-05-19", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/haifcgbgah" },
  { title:"CFP: Biology of drug resistance and tolerance in bacteria, viruses, fungi", journal:"Genome Biology (IF 9.4)", impact:"9.4", date:"2026-05-29", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/bjhecaieha" },
  { title:"CFP: Modeling the Impact of Protein Mutations on Chemical Reactions for Biochemistry, Protein Engineering, and Drug Discovery", journal:"Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation (JCTC) (IF 6.4)", impact:"6.4", date:"2026-06-01", url:"https://axial.acs.org/theoretical-and-computational-chemistry/call-for-papers-modeling-the-impact-of-protein-mutations-on-chemical-reactions-for-biochemistry-protein-engineering-and-drug-discovery" },
  { title:"CFP: Viruses and cancers", journal:"npj Viruses", impact:"", date:"2026-06-12", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/bfaffbjija" },
  { title:"CFP: Impact of AI on medical research", journal:"BMC Medical Research Methodology (IF 5.2)", impact:"5.2", date:"2026-06-18", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/cdieieiacj" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial Intelligence in Genomic Medicine", journal:"npj Genomic Medicine (IF 4.8)", impact:"4.8", date:"2026-06-23", url:"https://www.nature.com/npjgenmed/calls-for-papers" },
  { title:"CFP: Infectious disease outbreak in conflict-driven displacement", journal:"Journal of Epidemiology and Global Health (IF 6.1)", impact:"6.1", date:"2026-06-26", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/dijaajbcjh" },
  { title:"CFP: Infectious disease management in infants and children", journal:"BMC Infectious Diseases (IF 3.1)", impact:"3.1", date:"2026-06-30", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/jibcibadih" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial Intelligence and Computational Tools in Drug Development", journal:"AAPS Open", impact:"", date:"2026-06-30", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/ifeeeaadce" },
  { title:"CFP: Celebrating 80 years of the β-lactam Nobel Prize", journal:"ACS Infectious Diseases (IF 3.8)", impact:"3.8", date:"2026-06-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-celebrating-80-years-of-the-beta-lactam-nobel-prize" },
  { title:"CFP: Nontuberculous Mycobacterial (NTM) Pathogens ─ Biology, Infection, and Drug Discovery", journal:"ACS Infectious Diseases (IF 3.8)", impact:"3.8", date:"2026-06-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-nontuberculous-mycobacterial-ntm-pathogens-biology-infection-and-drug-discovery" },
  { title:"CFP: Call for Papers: Mass Spectrometry in Microbial Sciences", journal:"JASMS", impact:"", date:"2026-06-30", url:"https://axial.acs.org/analytical-chemistry/call-for-papers-mass-spectrometry-in-microbial-sciences" },
  { title:"CFP: Appropriate use of antibiotics: public health strategies, knowledge, and practice gaps", journal:"BMC Public Health (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-07-03", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/jbeiehebjj" },
  { title:"CFP: The economics of social mobility", journal:"Humanities and Social Sciences Communications (IF 3.9)", impact:"3.9", date:"2026-07-07", url:"https://www.nature.com/collections/gcdcdcfbce" },
  { title:"CFP: Artificial Intelligence in Omics and Translational Research", journal:"Human Genomics (IF 4.3)", impact:"4.3", date:"2026-07-15", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/dfaifjhcej" },
  { title:"CFP: Cardiometabolic and Hepatic Interconnections: From Mechanisms to Clinical Implications", journal:"Cardiovascular Diabetology (IF 10.6)", impact:"10.6", date:"2026-07-15", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/dieeaahafg" },
  { title:"CFP: Genomics of human pathogens", journal:"BMC Genomics (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-07-20", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/iaeiigfdid" },
  { title:"CFP: Hepatitis virus infections and treatment", journal:"BMC Infectious Diseases (IF 3.1)", impact:"3.1", date:"2026-07-20", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/cidhfidfaf" },
  { title:"CFP: Genomics of human pathogens", journal:"BMC Genomics (IF 4.2)", impact:"4.2", date:"2026-07-24", url:"https://link.springer.com/collections/iaeiigfdid" },

// ── 5. Active Research Projects (from mcphersonlab.github.io/research/projects) ──
const activeProjects = [
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-pharmacology\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ai-forecast-pharmacology<\/a>", questionHtml:"AI-driven pharmacological predictions", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.iuphar.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">IUPHAR Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://bpspubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/hub/call-for-papers\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">British Journal of Pharmacology<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 01, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Reviews Drug Discovery", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/EarthEpi\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">EarthEpi<\/a>", questionHtml:"Environmental epidemiology and climate-health relationships", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://meetings.aaas.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">AAAS Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Nature Microbiology/Nature Health<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"BMC Medicine", completionHtml:"1/1 (100%)" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/StormPath\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">StormPath<\/a>", questionHtml:"Storm and weather impacts on infectious disease dynamics", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://meetings.aaas.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">AAAS Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Nature Microbiology/Nature Health<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"BMC Medicine", completionHtml:"0/1 (0%)" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-abx-healthy\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">mgx-abx-healthy<\/a>", questionHtml:"Antibiotic effects on healthy gut microbiome", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://acc-conference.com/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">BSAC and GARDP Antimicrobial Chemotherapy Conference<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Nature Communications<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Communications", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-clostridioides-difficile\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">mgx-clostridioides-difficile<\/a>", questionHtml:"Metagenomic analysis of C. difficile", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Houston <em>C diff<\/em> &amp; Microbiome Conference<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/iaadjjbbea\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Genomic Medicine<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: March 28, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-abx-cdi\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">mgx-mbx-abx-cdi<\/a>", questionHtml:"Metagenomic and metabolomic determinants of CDI", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Houston <em>C diff<\/em> &amp; Microbiome Conference<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://link.springer.com/collections/idddeddhgf\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">BMC Personalized Medicine<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: August 05, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-acinetobacter-baumannii\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">amr-acinetobacter-baumannii<\/a>", questionHtml:"Carbapenem-resistant <em>A. baumannii<\/em>", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://imari.org\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">IMARI Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Antimicrobials and Resistance<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-enterococcus-faecium\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">amr-enterococcus-faecium<\/a>", questionHtml:"VRE genomics and resistance", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.tmc.edu/events/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">TMC AMR<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Antimicrobials and Resistance<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Journal of Antimicrobial Chemotherapy", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae<\/a>", questionHtml:"Carbapenem-resistant <em>K. pneumoniae<\/em>", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.idweek.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">IDSA IDWeek<\/a>; <a href=\"https://www.escmid.org/congress-events/escmid-global/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ESCMID Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Antimicrobials and Resistance<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-amr\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ai-amr<\/a>", questionHtml:"AI methods for antimicrobial resistance prediction", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://imari.org\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">IMARI Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-artificial-intelligence-for-next-generation-anti-infective-discovery\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ACS Infectious Diseases<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: April 01, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Machine Intelligence", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicroSCOPE\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">MicroSCOPE<\/a>", questionHtml:"Microbial speciation from colony observation and prediction", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ASM Microbe<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/eecajaidbe\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Antimicrobials and Resistance<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: April 07, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-influenza\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ai-forecast-influenza<\/a>", questionHtml:"AI forecasting of influenza dynamics", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ASV Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"The Lancet Infectious Diseases", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-microbiome-transmission\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ai-microbiome-transmission<\/a>", questionHtml:"AI modeling of microbiome transmission", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ASM Microbe<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicrobiomeHUES\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">MicrobiomeHUES<\/a>", questionHtml:"Hierarchical Unified Ecological Spectrum of the human microbiome", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ASM Microbe<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://link.springer.com/collections/ddbhjfadca\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">BMC Microbiology<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Microbiology", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-glp-1\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">mgx-mbx-glp-1<\/a>", questionHtml:"GLP-1 agonists and gut microbiome interactions", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://meetings.aaas.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">AAAS Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/ihecbjhhdd\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">npj Biofilms and Microbiomes<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Medicine", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-structural-biology\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ai-structural-biology<\/a>", questionHtml:"Artificial intelligence methodology in structural biology", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Biophysical Society Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.nature.com/collections/jbdjhghacg\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Nature Communications/Nature Structural &amp; Molecular Biology<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Methods", completionHtml:"0/0" },
```
