```{=html}
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/roi-pipeline-antimicrobial\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">roi-pipeline-antimicrobial<\/a>", questionHtml:"ROI analysis for antimicrobial drug development", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">ISPOR Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://link.springer.com/journal/40273\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Pharmacoeconomics<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: TBD<\/em>", journalHtml:"Value in Health", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/structure-function-pharmacology\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">structure-function-pharmacology<\/a>", questionHtml:"Structure-function relationships in pharmacology", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.iuphar.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">IUPHAR Annual<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://molpharm.aspetjournals.org/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Molecular Pharmacology<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: TBD<\/em>", journalHtml:"Nature Reviews Drug Discovery", completionHtml:"0/0" },
  { projectHtml:"<a href=\"https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cdi\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">tx-cdi<\/a>", questionHtml:"Treatment of <em>C. difficile<\/em> infection", conferenceHtml:"<a href=\"https://www.icds.si/\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">9th International <em>C. difficile<\/em> Symposium (ICDS)<\/a><br><em>Abstract: TBD<\/em>", callHtml:"<strong><a href=\"https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/kgmi20\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Gut Microbes<\/a><\/strong><br><em>Deadline: TBD<\/em>", journalHtml:"Clinical Infectious Diseases", completionHtml:"0/1 (0%)" }
];

// ── 6. Lab Life Events ───────────────────────────────────────────
// Media Day: Winter (January 15) and Summer (July 15), generated
// programmatically for all years in the calendar range
function generateMediaDay(startYear, endYear) {
  const events = [];
  for (let year = startYear; year <= endYear; year++) {
    events.push({ title:"🎬 Media Day (Winter)", start:`${year}-01-15`, end:`${year}-01-16`, details:`Bi-annual lab media day — Winter edition. Photo, video, and communications update.`, category:"lablife" });
    events.push({ title:"🎬 Media Day (Summer)", start:`${year}-07-15`, end:`${year}-07-16`, details:`Bi-annual lab media day — Summer edition. Photo, video, and communications update.`, category:"lablife" });
  }
  return events;
}
function generateAnnualLabLifeEvents(startYear, endYear, recurringEvents) {
  const events = [];
  for (let year = startYear; year <= endYear; year++) {
    recurringEvents.forEach(event => {
      const { monthDay, ...eventProps } = event;
      events.push({
        ...eventProps,
        start: `${year}-${monthDay}`
      });
    });
  }
  return events;
}
const mixersElixirsEvents = [
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: Atoms & Attractions", start:"2026-02-13", details:"Houston Museum of Natural Science adults-only night (7–11 PM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: ’90s Night (Sugar Land)", start:"2026-05-15", details:"HMNS Sugar Land Mixers & Elixirs (7–11 PM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: ’80s Night", start:"2026-06-12", details:"Houston Museum of Natural Science adults-only night (7–11 PM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: Masquerade Night", start:"2026-07-10", details:"Houston Museum of Natural Science adults-only night (7–11 PM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: Latin Night", start:"2026-08-14", details:"Houston Museum of Natural Science adults-only night (7–11 PM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: Spirits & Skeletons", start:"2026-10-31", details:"HMNS Mixers & Elixirs Halloween night (9 PM–1 AM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" },
  { title:"🍸 Mixers & Elixirs: New Year’s Eve", start:"2026-12-31", details:"HMNS Mixers & Elixirs New Year’s Eve party (9 PM–1 AM).", url:"https://www.hmns.org/visit/events/mixers-and-elixirs/" }
];
const recurringLabLifeEvents = [
  { title:"🇬🇷 Niko Niko's — Greek Independence Day", monthDay:"03-25", details:"Annual Greek Independence Day outing at Niko Niko's.", category:"lablife" },
  { title:"🇲🇽 Hugo's — Mexico's Independence Day", monthDay:"09-16", details:"Annual Mexico's Independence Day outing at Hugo's.", category:"lablife" }
];
const labLifeStatic = [
  ...generateMediaDay(2025, 2030),
  ...generateAnnualLabLifeEvents(2025, 2030, recurringLabLifeEvents),
  ...mixersElixirsEvents
];

// ── 6. Houston / Austin Venue Events ────────────────────────────
const venueStatic = [
  // Austin City Limits Music Festival (October, 2 weekends)
  { title:"🎵 Austin City Limits Music Festival (Wknd 1)", start:"2026-10-02", end:"2026-10-05", location:"Zilker Park, Austin, TX", url:"https://aclfestival.com/", category:"venue" },
  { title:"🎵 Austin City Limits Music Festival (Wknd 2)", start:"2026-10-09", end:"2026-10-12", location:"Zilker Park, Austin, TX", url:"https://aclfestival.com/", category:"venue" },
  // South by Southwest (March)
  { title:"🎸 South by Southwest (SXSW)", start:"2026-03-13", end:"2026-03-22", location:"Austin, TX", url:"https://www.sxsw.com/", category:"venue" },
  // Austin Food & Wine Festival (April)
  { title:"🍷 Austin Food & Wine Festival", start:"2026-04-24", end:"2026-04-27", location:"Austin, TX", url:"https://austinfoodandwinefestival.com/", category:"venue" },
  // Austin Film Festival (October)
  { title:"🎬 Austin Film Festival", start:"2026-10-22", end:"2026-10-27", location:"Austin, TX", url:"https://www.austinfilmfestival.com/", category:"venue" },
  // Trail of Lights (December, Austin)
  { title:"✨ Trail of Lights", start:"2026-12-10", end:"2026-12-24", location:"Zilker Park, Austin, TX", url:"https://austintrailoflights.org/", category:"venue" },
  // Houston area festivals & events
  { title:"🎭 Mardi Gras! Galveston", start:"2026-02-06", end:"2026-02-18", location:"Historic Strand District, Galveston, TX", url:"https://www.mardigrasgalveston.com/", category:"venue" },
  { title:"🤠 Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo", start:"2026-03-02", end:"2026-03-23", location:"NRG Park, Houston, TX", url:"https://www.rodeohouston.com/", category:"venue" },
  { title:"🎨 Bayou City Art Festival (Downtown)", start:"2026-03-28", end:"2026-03-30", location:"Sam Houston Park & Allen Parkway, Houston, TX", url:"https://www.bayoucityartfestival.com/", category:"venue" },
  { title:"🍽️ Houston Restaurant Week", start:"2026-08-01", end:"2026-09-01", location:"Houston, TX", url:"https://houstonrestaurantweeks.com/", category:"venue" },
  { title:"🎌 Japan Festival Houston", start:"2026-09-12", end:"2026-09-14", location:"Hermann Park, Houston, TX", url:"https://hermannpark.org/event/japan-festival/", category:"venue" }
];

// ── Helper: generate weekly events (e.g. Run Club, Happy Hour) ──
function generateWeekly(title, dayOfWeek, startISO, endISO, details, category, meta = {}) {
  const events = [];
  let cur = new Date(startISO + "T00:00:00");
  const endDate = new Date(endISO + "T00:00:00");
  // Advance to first matching weekday
  while (cur.getDay() !== dayOfWeek) cur.setDate(cur.getDate() + 1);
  while (cur <= endDate) {
    const y = cur.getFullYear();
    const m = String(cur.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");
    const d = String(cur.getDate()).padStart(2,"0");
    events.push({ title, start: `${y}-${m}-${d}`, details, category, ...meta });
    cur.setDate(cur.getDate() + 7);
  }
  return events;
}

// ── Helper: generate monthly venue events (cycling through venues) ──
function generateMonthlyVenues(venueList, startISO, endISO) {
  const events = [];
  const endDate = new Date(endISO + "T00:00:00");
  let cur = new Date(startISO + "T00:00:00");
  cur.setDate(1); // start of month
  let idx = 0;
  while (cur <= endDate) {
    const venue = venueList[idx % venueList.length];
    // Use 3rd Saturday of month
    const month = cur.getMonth();
    const year = cur.getFullYear();
    // Find first Saturday
    let day = new Date(year, month, 1);
    while (day.getDay() !== 6) day.setDate(day.getDate() + 1);
    day.setDate(day.getDate() + 14); // 3rd Saturday
    if (day <= endDate) {
      const y = day.getFullYear();
      const m = String(day.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");
      const d = String(day.getDate()).padStart(2,"0");
      events.push({
        title: `🏛️ ${venue.name}`,
        start: `${y}-${m}-${d}`,
        location: venue.location,
        url: venue.url,
        details: venue.details,
        category: "venue"
      });
    }
    idx++;
    cur.setMonth(cur.getMonth() + 1);
  }
  return events;
}

// Houston monthly venues (rotation)
const houstonVenues = [
  { name:"Houston Museum of Natural Science", location:"5555 Hermann Park Dr, Houston, TX", url:"https://www.hmns.org/", details:"Monthly visit to the Houston Museum of Natural Science." },
  { name:"Houston Symphony", location:"615 Louisiana St, Houston, TX", url:"https://www.houstonsymphony.org/", details:"Monthly Houston Symphony performance." },
  { name:"Miller Outdoor Theatre", location:"6000 Hermann Park Dr, Houston, TX", url:"https://milleroutdoortheatre.com/", details:"Monthly Miller Outdoor Theatre event (free outdoor performances)." },
  { name:"Houston Zoo", location:"6200 Hermann Park Dr, Houston, TX", url:"https://www.houstonzoo.org/", details:"Monthly visit to the Houston Zoo." }
];

// Generate recurring events
const runClubMonday   = generateWeekly("🏃 Run Club (River Oaks)", 1, "2025-10-01", "2027-12-31", "Weekly Monday Run Club — River Oaks", "lablife");   // 1 = Monday
const runClubThursday = generateWeekly("🏃 Run Club (Greenbriar)",  4, "2025-10-01", "2027-12-31", "Weekly Thursday Run Club — Greenbriar", "lablife"); // 4 = Thursday
const mfahHappyHour = generateWeekly(
  "🎨 MFAH Friday Happy Hour",
  5,
  "2026-01-02",
  "2027-12-31",
  "Happy Hour Fridays at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston (5–8 PM).",
  "lablife",
  { url: "https://www.mfah.org/events/happy-hour" }
);
const monthlyVenueEvents = generateMonthlyVenues(houstonVenues, "2025-10-01", "2027-12-31");

// ================================================================
//  ASSEMBLE FullCalendar events array
// ================================================================

// Normalize and validate URLs (http/https only).
const normalizeUrl = (url) => {
  if (!url) return undefined;
  const trimmed = String(url).trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(trimmed);
    if (parsed.protocol === "http:" || parsed.protocol === "https:") {
      return parsed.href;
    }
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
  return undefined;
};

function buildAllEvents() {
  const events = [];

  // Conferences — blue
  const abstractEvents = [];
  conferences.forEach(c => {
    const ev = {
      title: `📅 ${c.title}`,
      start: c.start,
      end: c.end,
      order: 0,
      color: "#0d6efd",
      url: normalizeUrl(c.url),
      extendedProps: {
        category: "conference",
        location: c.location || "",
        url: c.url || "",
        cfpOpen: c.cfpOpen || "",
        cfpClose: c.cfpClose || "",
        cfpNote: c.cfpNote || ""
      }
    };
    events.push(ev);

    // Abstract submission window — cyan, shown as a separate multi-day event
    if (c.cfpOpen || c.cfpClose) {
      // Start = cfpOpen if available, else cfpClose day (single-day)
      // End   = cfpClose + 1 day (FullCalendar end is exclusive) if available
      const winStart = c.cfpOpen || c.cfpClose;
      const winEnd   = c.cfpClose
        ? (() => { const d = new Date(c.cfpClose + "T00:00:00"); d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); return d.toISOString().slice(0,10); })()
        : undefined;
      abstractEvents.push({
        title: `📋 Abstracts: ${c.title}`,
        start: winStart,
        end: winEnd,
        order: 1,
        color: "rgba(13,202,240,0.1)",
        textColor: "#00495a",
        url: normalizeUrl(c.url),
        extendedProps: {
          category: "abstract",
          conference: c.title,
          cfpOpen: c.cfpOpen || "",
          cfpClose: c.cfpClose || "",
          cfpNote: c.cfpNote || "",
          url: c.url || ""
        }
      });
    }
  });

  // Calls for Papers — red
  callsForPapers.forEach(p => {
    events.push({
      title: `📝 ${p.title}`,
      start: p.date,
      allDay: true,
      order: 0,
      color: "#dc3545",
      url: normalizeUrl(p.url),
      extendedProps: {
        category: "cfp",
        journal: p.journal || "",
        url: p.url || "",
        deadline: p.date
      }
    });
  });

  // Trainee Deadlines — violet
  traineeDeadlineEvents.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      allDay: true,
      order: 3,
      color: "rgba(102,16,242,0.12)",
      textColor: "#6610f2",
      extendedProps: {
        category: "trainee",
        detail: e.detail || "",
        phase: e.phase || ""
      }
    });
  });

  // Lab Life static events — green
  labLifeStatic.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      end: e.end,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(25,135,84,0.1)",
      textColor: "#198754",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: { category: "lablife", details: e.details }
    });
  });

  // Run Club Monday (River Oaks) — green
  runClubMonday.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(40,167,69,0.1)",
      textColor: "#198754",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: { category: "lablife", details: e.details }
    });
  });

  // Run Club Thursday (Greenbriar) — green
  runClubThursday.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(40,167,69,0.1)",
      textColor: "#198754",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: { category: "lablife", details: e.details }
    });
  });

  // MFAH Happy Hour Fridays — green
  mfahHappyHour.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(25,135,84,0.1)",
      textColor: "#198754",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: { category: "lablife", details: e.details }
    });
  });

  // Venue static events — purple
  venueStatic.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      end: e.end || undefined,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(111,66,193,0.1)",
      textColor: "#6f42c1",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: { category: "venue", location: e.location || "", url: normalizeUrl(e.url) || "" }
    });
  });

  // Monthly Houston venues — purple
  monthlyVenueEvents.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.start,
      order: 2,
      color: "rgba(111,66,193,0.1)",
      textColor: "#6f42c1",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: {
        category: "venue",
        location: e.location || "",
        url: normalizeUrl(e.url) || "",
        details: e.details || ""
      }
    });
  });

  // NIH Grant Deadlines — UT burnt orange
  nihGrantDeadlines.forEach(e => {
    events.push({
      title: e.title,
      start: e.date,
      allDay: true,
      order: 0,
      color: "#BF5700",
      url: normalizeUrl(e.url),
      extendedProps: {
        category: "nih",
        detail: e.detail || "",
        note: e.note || "",
        url: e.url || ""
      }
    });
  });

  // Abstract submission events are pushed last so they appear at the bottom
  abstractEvents.forEach(e => events.push(e));

  return events;
}

// ================================================================
//  MODAL HELPERS
// ================================================================
// Open external links on click when available; otherwise show the modal.
function handleEventClick(info) {
  const eventUrl = info.event.url;
  if (eventUrl) {
    info.jsEvent.preventDefault();
    window.open(eventUrl, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer");
    return;
  }
  openModal(info);
}

function openModal(info) {
  const ep = info.event.extendedProps;
  const color = info.event.backgroundColor || "#555";
  document.getElementById("event-modal-colorbar").style.background = color;
  document.getElementById("modal-title").textContent = info.event.title.replace(/^[^\s]+\s/, "");

  let rows = "";
  const fmt = (label, val) => val ? `<tr><td>${label}</td><td>${val}</td></tr>` : "";
  const eventUrl = info.event.url;

  if (ep.category === "conference") {
    const dateRange = info.event.end
      ? `${fmtDate(info.event.start)} – ${fmtDate(new Date(info.event.end.getTime()-86400000))}`
      : fmtDate(info.event.start);
    rows += fmt("Dates", dateRange);
    rows += fmt("Location", ep.location);
    if (ep.cfpOpen || ep.cfpClose) {
      const cfp = [ep.cfpOpen && `Open: ${ep.cfpOpen}`, ep.cfpClose && `Close: ${ep.cfpClose}`].filter(Boolean).join(" | ");
      rows += fmt("Abstract Submission", cfp);
    }
    if (ep.cfpNote) rows += fmt("Note", ep.cfpNote);
    if (eventUrl) rows += fmt("Website", `<a href="${eventUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Visit →</a>`);
  } else if (ep.category === "abstract") {
    rows += fmt("Conference", ep.conference);
    if (ep.cfpOpen) rows += fmt("Opens", fmtDate(ep.cfpOpen));
    if (ep.cfpClose) rows += fmt("Closes", fmtDate(ep.cfpClose));
    if (ep.cfpNote) rows += fmt("Note", ep.cfpNote);
    if (eventUrl) rows += fmt("Website", `<a href="${eventUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Visit →</a>`);
  } else if (ep.category === "cfp") {
    rows += fmt("Deadline", fmtDate(info.event.start));
    rows += fmt("Journal", ep.journal);
    if (eventUrl) rows += fmt("Website", `<a href="${eventUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Visit →</a>`);
  } else if (ep.category === "trainee") {
    rows += fmt("Date", fmtDate(info.event.start));
    if (ep.phase) rows += fmt("Event", ep.phase);
    if (ep.detail) rows += fmt("Details", ep.detail);
  } else if (ep.category === "lablife") {
    rows += fmt("Details", ep.details);
  } else if (ep.category === "venue") {
    rows += fmt("Location", ep.location);
    if (ep.details) rows += fmt("Details", ep.details);
    if (eventUrl) rows += fmt("Website", `<a href="${eventUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Visit →</a>`);
  } else if (ep.category === "nih") {
    rows += fmt("Deadline", fmtDate(info.event.start));
    if (ep.detail) rows += fmt("Type", ep.detail);
    if (ep.note) rows += fmt("Note", ep.note);
    if (eventUrl) rows += fmt("Website", `<a href="${eventUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Visit →</a>`);
  }

  document.getElementById("modal-table").innerHTML = rows;
  document.getElementById("event-modal-overlay").classList.add("open");
}

function closeModal() {
  document.getElementById("event-modal-overlay").classList.remove("open");
}

// Close on overlay click
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  document.getElementById("event-modal-overlay").addEventListener("click", function(e) {
    if (e.target === this) closeModal();
  });
});

function fmtDate(d) {
  if (!d) return "";
  const dt = (typeof d === "string") ? new Date(d + "T00:00:00") : d;
  return dt.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { year:"numeric", month:"long", day:"numeric" });
}

function isPastDeadline(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return false;
  const deadline = new Date(dateStr + "T00:00:00");
  if (isNaN(deadline.getTime())) return false;
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return today > deadline;
}

const agendaDoneStorageKey = "mcphersonlab-calendar-agenda-done";
const minComparableAgendaTitleLength = 12;
let agendaDoneItems = new Set();

function parseLocalDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return null;
  const date = new Date(dateStr + "T00:00:00");
  return isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date;
}

function getTodayLocal() {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return today;
}

function loadAgendaDoneItems() {
  try {
    const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(agendaDoneStorageKey);
    const parsed = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
    return new Set(Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : []);
  } catch {
    return new Set();
  }
}

function saveAgendaDoneItems() {
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(agendaDoneStorageKey, JSON.stringify([...agendaDoneItems]));
  } catch {
    // Ignore storage failures and keep the current in-memory state.
  }
}

function buildAgendaItemId(prefix, title, dateStr) {
  return [prefix, title, dateStr || ""].join("::");
}

// Returns plain text for use with textContent-based rendering.
function formatCallTitle(title, fallback = "Call for Papers") {
  const cleaned = String(title || "")
    .replace(/^CFP:\s*/, "")
    .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "")
    .trim();
  return cleaned || fallback;
}

function parseHtmlDocument(html) {
  return new DOMParser().parseFromString(String(html || ""), "text/html");
}

function stripHtmlToText(html) {
  const parsed = parseHtmlDocument(html);
  return (parsed.body.textContent || "")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
}

function normalizeMatchText(value) {
  return stripHtmlToText(value)
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/&/g, " and ")
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, " ")
    .trim()
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ");
}

function normalizeComparableUrl(url) {
  const normalized = normalizeUrl(url);
  return normalized ? normalized.replace(/\/+$/, "") : "";
}

function extractComparableUrls(html) {
  const parsed = parseHtmlDocument(html);
  return [...parsed.querySelectorAll("a")]
    .map(link => normalizeComparableUrl(link.getAttribute("href")))
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function extractComparableLinkTexts(html) {
  const parsed = parseHtmlDocument(html);
  return [...parsed.querySelectorAll("a")]
    .map(link => normalizeMatchText(link.textContent))
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function extractGithubRepoUrl(html) {
  const parsed = parseHtmlDocument(html);
  const repoLink = [...parsed.querySelectorAll("a")]
    .map(link => link.getAttribute("href"))
    .find(href => /^https:\/\/github\.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/?$/i.test(String(href || "").trim()));
  return repoLink ? repoLink.replace(/\/+$/, "") : "";
}

function isComparableTitleMatch(sourceTitle, candidateTitle) {
  if (!sourceTitle || !candidateTitle) return false;
  if (sourceTitle === candidateTitle) return true;
  const shorter = sourceTitle.length <= candidateTitle.length ? sourceTitle : candidateTitle;
  const longer = shorter === sourceTitle ? candidateTitle : sourceTitle;
  return shorter.length >= minComparableAgendaTitleLength && longer.includes(shorter);
}

function getAgendaItemProjects(itemType, sourceItem) {
  if (!Array.isArray(activeProjects) || !sourceItem) return [];

  const sourceUrl = normalizeComparableUrl(sourceItem.url);
  const sourceTitle = normalizeMatchText(sourceItem.title);

  return activeProjects
    .filter(project => {
      const projectFieldHtml = itemType === "abstract" ? project.conferenceHtml : project.callHtml;
      if (!projectFieldHtml) return false;

      if (sourceUrl && extractComparableUrls(projectFieldHtml).includes(sourceUrl)) {
        return true;
      }

      if (itemType === "abstract" && sourceTitle) {
        return extractComparableLinkTexts(projectFieldHtml)
          .some(linkText => isComparableTitleMatch(sourceTitle, linkText));
      }

      return false;
    })
    .map(project => ({
      name: stripHtmlToText(project.projectHtml) || "Project",
      href: extractGithubRepoUrl(project.projectHtml),
      completion: formatAgendaProjectCompletion(project)
    }));
}

function formatAgendaProjectCompletion(project) {
  const raw = String((project && project.completionHtml) || "").trim();
  const value = getProjectCompletionValue(project);
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return raw || "—";
  if (raw.includes("%")) return raw;
  return `${Math.round(value)}% (${raw})`;
}

function buildAgendaSections() {
  const today = getTodayLocal();
  const currentAbstracts = conferences
    .filter(conference => {
      const closeDate = parseLocalDate(conference.cfpClose);
      if (!closeDate) return false;
      const openDate = parseLocalDate(conference.cfpOpen);
      return openDate ? (today >= openDate && today <= closeDate) : today <= closeDate;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => parseLocalDate(a.cfpClose) - parseLocalDate(b.cfpClose))
    .map(conference => ({
      id: buildAgendaItemId("abstract", conference.title, conference.cfpClose || conference.cfpOpen),
      title: conference.title,
      href: normalizeUrl(conference.url),
      meta: [
        conference.cfpOpen ? `Opened ${fmtDate(conference.cfpOpen)}` : "Open now",
        conference.cfpClose ? `Closes ${fmtDate(conference.cfpClose)}` : ""
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" • "),
      detail: conference.location || conference.cfpNote || "",
      projects: getAgendaItemProjects("abstract", conference)
    }));

  const upcomingCallsForPapers = callsForPapers
    .filter(call => {
      const deadline = parseLocalDate(call.date);
      return deadline && deadline >= today;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => parseLocalDate(a.date) - parseLocalDate(b.date))
    .slice(0, 5)
    .map(call => ({
      id: buildAgendaItemId("cfp", call.title, call.date),
      title: formatCallTitle(call.title),
      href: normalizeUrl(call.url),
      meta: `Due ${fmtDate(call.date)}`,
      detail: call.journal || "",
      projects: getAgendaItemProjects("cfp", call)
    }));

  const nextNihDeadline = nihGrantDeadlines
    .filter(deadline => {
      const dueDate = parseLocalDate(deadline.date);
      return dueDate && dueDate >= today;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => parseLocalDate(a.date) - parseLocalDate(b.date))
    .slice(0, 1)
    .map(deadline => ({
      id: buildAgendaItemId("nih", deadline.title, deadline.date),
      title: deadline.title,
      href: normalizeUrl(deadline.url),
      meta: `Due ${fmtDate(deadline.date)}`,
      detail: [deadline.detail, deadline.note].filter(Boolean).join(" • ")
    }));

  const nextConferences = conferences
    .filter(conference => {
      const startDate = parseLocalDate(conference.start);
      return startDate && startDate >= today;
    })
    .sort((a, b) => parseLocalDate(a.start) - parseLocalDate(b.start))
    .slice(0, 2)
    .map(conference => ({
      id: buildAgendaItemId("conference", conference.title, conference.start),
      title: conference.title,
      href: normalizeUrl(conference.url),
      meta: `${fmtDate(conference.start)}${conference.end ? ` – ${fmtDate(conference.end)}` : ""}`,
      detail: conference.location || ""
    }));

  return [
    {
      key: "abstracts",
      title: "Current Calls for Abstracts",
      emptyMessage: "No abstract windows are currently open.",
      items: currentAbstracts
    },
    {
      key: "cfps",
      title: "Next Five Calls for Papers",
      emptyMessage: "No upcoming calls for papers are available.",
      items: upcomingCallsForPapers
    },
    {
      key: "nih",
      title: "Next NIH Submission Deadline",
      emptyMessage: "No upcoming NIH submission deadline is available.",
      items: nextNihDeadline
    },
    {
      key: "conferences",
      title: "Next Two Conferences",
      emptyMessage: "No upcoming conferences are available.",
      items: nextConferences
    }
  ];
}

function setAgendaItemDone(itemId, isDone) {
  if (isDone) {
    agendaDoneItems.add(itemId);
  } else {
    agendaDoneItems.delete(itemId);
  }
  saveAgendaDoneItems();
  renderAgenda();
}

function createAgendaItemElement(item, isDone) {
  const listItem = document.createElement("li");
  listItem.className = `agenda-item${isDone ? " agenda-item-done" : ""}`;

  const header = document.createElement("div");
  header.className = "agenda-item-header";

  const content = document.createElement("div");
  content.className = "agenda-item-content";

  const titleElement = item.href ? document.createElement("a") : document.createElement("span");
  titleElement.className = "agenda-item-title";
  titleElement.textContent = item.title;
  if (item.href) {
    titleElement.href = item.href;
    titleElement.target = "_blank";
    titleElement.rel = "noopener noreferrer";
  }
  content.appendChild(titleElement);

  if (item.meta) {
    const meta = document.createElement("p");
    meta.className = "agenda-item-meta";
    meta.textContent = item.meta;
    content.appendChild(meta);
  }

  if (item.detail) {
    const detail = document.createElement("p");
    detail.className = "agenda-item-detail";
    detail.textContent = item.detail;
    content.appendChild(detail);
  }

  if (Array.isArray(item.projects)) {
    const projectsWrapper = document.createElement("div");
    projectsWrapper.className = "agenda-item-projects";

    const projectsLabel = document.createElement("p");
    projectsLabel.className = "agenda-item-projects-label";
    projectsLabel.textContent = "Targeting projects";
    projectsWrapper.appendChild(projectsLabel);

    if (item.projects.length) {
      const projectsList = document.createElement("ul");
      projectsList.className = "agenda-item-project-list";
      item.projects.forEach(project => {
        const projectItem = document.createElement("li");
        projectItem.className = "agenda-item-project";

        const name = project.href ? document.createElement("a") : document.createElement("span");
        name.className = "agenda-item-project-name";
        name.textContent = project.name;
        if (project.href) {
          name.href = project.href;
          name.target = "_blank";
          name.rel = "noopener noreferrer";
        }
        projectItem.appendChild(name);

        const completion = document.createElement("span");
        completion.className = "agenda-item-project-completion";
        completion.textContent = project.completion;
        projectItem.appendChild(completion);

        projectsList.appendChild(projectItem);
      });
      projectsWrapper.appendChild(projectsList);
    } else {
      const emptyProjects = document.createElement("p");
      emptyProjects.className = "agenda-item-projects-empty";
      emptyProjects.textContent = "No active projects linked yet.";
      projectsWrapper.appendChild(emptyProjects);
    }

    content.appendChild(projectsWrapper);
  }

  header.appendChild(content);

  const action = document.createElement("button");
  action.type = "button";
  action.className = `agenda-action${isDone ? " agenda-action-secondary" : ""}`;
  action.textContent = isDone ? "Undo" : "Done";
  action.addEventListener("click", () => setAgendaItemDone(item.id, !isDone));
  header.appendChild(action);

  listItem.appendChild(header);
  return listItem;
}

function renderAgendaSections(container, sections, isDone) {
  if (!container) return;
  container.innerHTML = "";

  if (isDone) {
    const doneSections = sections
      .map(section => ({
        ...section,
        items: section.items.filter(item => agendaDoneItems.has(item.id))
      }))
      .filter(section => section.items.length);

    if (!doneSections.length) {
      const empty = document.createElement("p");
      empty.className = "agenda-empty";
      empty.textContent = "No agenda items marked done yet.";
      container.appendChild(empty);
      return;
    }

    doneSections.forEach(section => {
      const sectionEl = document.createElement("section");
      sectionEl.className = "agenda-group";

      const title = document.createElement("h4");
      title.textContent = section.title;
      sectionEl.appendChild(title);

      const list = document.createElement("ul");
      list.className = "agenda-list";
      section.items.forEach(item => list.appendChild(createAgendaItemElement(item, true)));
      sectionEl.appendChild(list);
      container.appendChild(sectionEl);
    });

    return;
  }

  sections.forEach(section => {
    const activeItems = section.items.filter(item => !agendaDoneItems.has(item.id));
    const sectionEl = document.createElement("section");
    sectionEl.className = "agenda-group";

    const title = document.createElement("h3");
    title.textContent = section.title;
    sectionEl.appendChild(title);

    if (!activeItems.length) {
      const empty = document.createElement("p");
      empty.className = "agenda-empty";
      empty.textContent = section.emptyMessage;
      sectionEl.appendChild(empty);
    } else {
      const list = document.createElement("ul");
      list.className = "agenda-list";
      activeItems.forEach(item => list.appendChild(createAgendaItemElement(item, false)));
      sectionEl.appendChild(list);
    }

    container.appendChild(sectionEl);
  });
}

function renderAgenda() {
  const sections = buildAgendaSections();
  renderAgendaSections(document.getElementById("agenda-active"), sections, false);
  renderAgendaSections(document.getElementById("agenda-done"), sections, true);
}

// ================================================================
//  PROJECTS TABLE
// ================================================================

const projectsSortState = {
  key: null,
  direction: "asc"
};

function getProjectCallDeadline(project) {
  const callHtml = String((project && project.callHtml) || "");
  const m = callHtml.match(/Deadline:\s*([A-Za-z]+\s+\d{1,2},\s*\d{4})/);
  if (!m) return "";
  const d = new Date(m[1]);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return "";
  const year = d.getFullYear();
  const month = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
}

function getProjectCompletionValue(project) {
  const text = String((project && project.completionHtml) || "").trim();
  if (!text || text === "—") return null;
  const pctMatch = text.match(/\((\d+)%\)/);
  if (pctMatch) return Number.parseFloat(pctMatch[1]);
  const fracMatch = text.match(/^(\d+)\/(\d+)$/);
  if (fracMatch) {
    const den = Number.parseFloat(fracMatch[2]);
    if (den === 0) return 0;
    return (Number.parseFloat(fracMatch[1]) / den) * 100;
  }
  return null;
}

function getSortedProjects(projects) {
  if (!Array.isArray(projects)) return [];
  if (!projectsSortState.key) return [...projects];

  const { key, direction } = projectsSortState;
  const multiplier = direction === "desc" ? -1 : 1;

  return [...projects].sort((a, b) => {
    let comparison = 0;

    if (key === "call") {
      const aDate = getProjectCallDeadline(a);
      const bDate = getProjectCallDeadline(b);
      if (!aDate && !bDate) {
        comparison = 0;
      } else if (!aDate) {
        comparison = 1;
      } else if (!bDate) {
        comparison = -1;
      } else {
        comparison = aDate.localeCompare(bDate) * multiplier;
      }
    } else if (key === "completion") {
      const aVal = getProjectCompletionValue(a);
      const bVal = getProjectCompletionValue(b);
      const aMissing = aVal == null;
      const bMissing = bVal == null;
      const missingComparison = Number(aMissing) - Number(bMissing);
      if (missingComparison !== 0) {
        comparison = missingComparison;
      } else {
        comparison = aMissing ? 0 : (aVal - bVal) * multiplier;
      }
    }

    if (comparison !== 0) return comparison;

    const aName = String((a && a.projectHtml) || "").replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "");
    const bName = String((b && b.projectHtml) || "").replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "");
    return aName.localeCompare(bName);
  });
}

function updateProjectsSortButtons() {
  document.querySelectorAll("#projects-table .table-sort").forEach(button => {
    const indicator = button.querySelector(".sort-indicator");
    const isActive = button.dataset.sortKey === projectsSortState.key;
    button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", isActive ? "true" : "false");
    if (indicator) {
      indicator.textContent = isActive
        ? (projectsSortState.direction === "desc" ? "↓" : "↑")
        : "↕";
    }
  });
}

function setProjectsSort(key) {
  const defaultDirection = key === "completion" ? "desc" : "asc";
  if (projectsSortState.key === key) {
    projectsSortState.direction = projectsSortState.direction === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc";
  } else {
    projectsSortState.key = key;
    projectsSortState.direction = defaultDirection;
  }

  renderProjectsTable(activeProjects);
  updateProjectsSortButtons();
}

function renderProjectsTable(projects) {
  const tbody = document.getElementById("projects-tbody");
  if (!tbody) return;
  tbody.innerHTML = "";
  if (!projects || !projects.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td class="projects-error" colspan="6">No projects data available.</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  getSortedProjects(projects).forEach(project => {
    const row = document.createElement("tr");
    if (isPastDeadline(getProjectCallDeadline(project))) {
      row.classList.add("past-deadline-row");
    }
    [
      project.projectHtml,
      project.questionHtml,
      project.conferenceHtml,
      project.callHtml,
      project.journalHtml
    ].forEach(html => {
      const cell = document.createElement("td");
      cell.innerHTML = html;
      row.appendChild(cell);
    });
    const completionCell = document.createElement("td");
    completionCell.className = "completion-cell";
    completionCell.textContent = project.completionHtml || "—";
    row.appendChild(completionCell);
    tbody.appendChild(row);
  });
}

function loadProjectsTable() {
  renderProjectsTable(activeProjects);
  renderUnlinkedCallsForPapersTable(unlinkedCallsForPapers);
  updateProjectsSortButtons();
  updateUnlinkedCfpsSortButtons();
}

const unlinkedCfpsSortState = {
  key: "date",
  direction: "asc"
};

function getUnlinkedCfpJournalInfo(cfp) {
  const rawJournal = String((cfp && cfp.journal) || "").trim();
  const suffixMatch = rawJournal.match(/^(.*)\s*\(IF\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\)$/i);
  const journal = (suffixMatch && suffixMatch[1] ? suffixMatch[1].trim() : "") || rawJournal;
  const impactText = String((cfp && cfp.impact) || (suffixMatch && suffixMatch[2]) || "").trim();
  const impactValue = Number.parseFloat(impactText);
  return {
    journal,
    impactText,
    impactValue: Number.isFinite(impactValue) ? impactValue : null
  };
}

function getSortedUnlinkedCallsForPapers(callForPapers) {
  if (!Array.isArray(callForPapers)) return [];
  if (!unlinkedCfpsSortState.key) return [...callForPapers];

  const { key, direction } = unlinkedCfpsSortState;
  const multiplier = direction === "desc" ? -1 : 1;

  return [...callForPapers].sort((a, b) => {
    let comparison = 0;

    if (key === "impact") {
      const aImpact = getUnlinkedCfpJournalInfo(a).impactValue;
      const bImpact = getUnlinkedCfpJournalInfo(b).impactValue;
      const aMissing = aImpact == null;
      const bMissing = bImpact == null;
      const missingComparison = Number(aMissing) - Number(bMissing);
      if (missingComparison !== 0) {
        comparison = missingComparison;
      } else {
        comparison = aMissing ? 0 : (aImpact - bImpact) * multiplier;
      }
    } else if (key === "date") {
      const aDate = String((a && a.date) || "");
      const bDate = String((b && b.date) || "");
      if (!aDate && !bDate) {
        comparison = 0;
      } else if (!aDate) {
        comparison = 1;
      } else if (!bDate) {
        comparison = -1;
      } else {
        comparison = aDate.localeCompare(bDate) * multiplier;
      }
    }

    if (comparison !== 0) return comparison;

    const aTitle = String((a && (a.title || a.journal)) || "");
    const bTitle = String((b && (b.title || b.journal)) || "");
    return aTitle.localeCompare(bTitle);
  });
}

function updateUnlinkedCfpsSortButtons() {
  document.querySelectorAll("#unlinked-cfps-table .table-sort").forEach(button => {
    const indicator = button.querySelector(".sort-indicator");
    const isActive = button.dataset.sortKey === unlinkedCfpsSortState.key;
    button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", isActive ? "true" : "false");
    if (indicator) {
      indicator.textContent = isActive
        ? (unlinkedCfpsSortState.direction === "desc" ? "↓" : "↑")
        : "↕";
    }
  });
}

function setUnlinkedCfpsSort(key) {
  const defaultDirection = key === "impact" ? "desc" : "asc";
  if (unlinkedCfpsSortState.key === key) {
    unlinkedCfpsSortState.direction = unlinkedCfpsSortState.direction === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc";
  } else {
    unlinkedCfpsSortState.key = key;
    unlinkedCfpsSortState.direction = defaultDirection;
  }

  renderUnlinkedCallsForPapersTable(unlinkedCallsForPapers);
  updateUnlinkedCfpsSortButtons();
}

function renderUnlinkedCallsForPapersTable(callForPapers) {
  const tbody = document.getElementById("unlinked-cfps-tbody");
  if (!tbody) return;
  tbody.innerHTML = "";
  if (!callForPapers || !callForPapers.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td class="projects-error" colspan="4">All calls for papers are already linked to active projects.</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  getSortedUnlinkedCallsForPapers(callForPapers).forEach(cfp => {
    const row = document.createElement("tr");
    if (isPastDeadline(cfp.date)) {
      row.classList.add("past-deadline-row");
    }
    const titleCell = document.createElement("td");
    const displayTitle = formatCallTitle(cfp.title, cfp.journal || "Call for Papers");
    const href = normalizeUrl(cfp.url);
    if (href) {
      const link = document.createElement("a");
      link.href = href;
      link.target = "_blank";
      link.rel = "noopener noreferrer";
      link.textContent = displayTitle;
      titleCell.appendChild(link);
    } else {
      titleCell.textContent = displayTitle;
    }

    const journalInfo = getUnlinkedCfpJournalInfo(cfp);
    const journalCell = document.createElement("td");
    journalCell.textContent = journalInfo.journal || cfp.journal || "";

    const impactCell = document.createElement("td");
    impactCell.textContent = journalInfo.impactText || "—";

    const deadlineCell = document.createElement("td");
    deadlineCell.textContent = fmtDate(cfp.date) || cfp.date || "";

    row.appendChild(titleCell);
    row.appendChild(journalCell);
    row.appendChild(impactCell);
    row.appendChild(deadlineCell);
    tbody.appendChild(row);
  });
}

// ================================================================
//  FILTER
// ================================================================
let allEvents = [];
let calendarInstance = null;

function applyFilters() {
  if (!calendarInstance) return;
  const show = {
    conference: document.getElementById("chk-conference").checked,
    abstract:   document.getElementById("chk-abstract").checked,
    cfp:        document.getElementById("chk-cfp").checked,
    trainee:    document.getElementById("chk-trainee").checked,
    lablife:    document.getElementById("chk-lablife").checked,
    venue:      document.getElementById("chk-venue").checked,
    nih:        document.getElementById("chk-nih").checked
  };
  const filtered = allEvents.filter(e => show[e.extendedProps.category]);
  calendarInstance.removeAllEvents();
  calendarInstance.addEventSource(filtered);
}

// ================================================================
//  INIT FullCalendar
// ================================================================
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  loadProjectsTable();
  agendaDoneItems = loadAgendaDoneItems();
  renderAgenda();

  allEvents = buildAllEvents();

  const calEl = document.getElementById("calendar");
  if (typeof FullCalendar === "undefined") {
    calEl.replaceChildren();
    const errorMessage = document.createElement("p");
    errorMessage.className = "calendar-error";
    errorMessage.textContent = "Calendar view is temporarily unavailable because the calendar library could not be loaded.";
    calEl.appendChild(errorMessage);
    return;
  }
  calendarInstance = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calEl, {
    initialView: "dayGridMonth",
    initialDate: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
    height: "auto",
    headerToolbar: {
      left:   "prev,next today",
      center: "title",
      right:  "dayGridMonth,timeGridWeek,listMonth"
    },
    buttonText: {
      today:     "Today",
      month:     "Month",
      week:      "Week",
      listMonth: "List"
    },
    events: allEvents,
    eventOrder: "order,start,-duration,allDay,title",
    eventClick: handleEventClick,
    eventTimeFormat: { hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit", omitZeroMinute: true },
    nowIndicator: true,
    dayMaxEvents: 4
  });

  calendarInstance.render();
});
</script>
```
